# Alternative-to-spreadsheet angle

## When to use

Use when current solution is manual.

## Why it works

Manual workflows are visible pain.

## Mechanism

Frames product as escape from brittle process.

## Required inputs

Before/after spreadsheet chaos.

## When not to use

If spreadsheet is actually sufficient.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

CTR, demo views, activation.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
